title: MCP-A action Request
description: Request for the action primitive (SPEC §action): ask the service to take a state-changing action on the user's behalf. Two shapes: a New Action request (natural-language intent) and a Continuation request (supply previously requested inputs against an existing action_id). Discriminated by the presence of `action_id`: a Continuation MUST include `action_id` + `inputs`; a New Action MUST NOT include `action_id`.

oneOf.title: action New Request
oneOf.description: Start a new action from a natural-language request. Identified by the absence of `action_id`.

request.description: Natural-language description of the state-changing action to take (e.g., 'Create a follow-up task for the Acme renewal due Friday').

user_id.description: Authenticated user ID. The action is performed on this user's behalf and RBAC is evaluated per call.

user_preferences.description: Per-call preference overrides (e.g., timezone, output format).

timeout_seconds.description: Execution timeout (default 30). On exceed, return TIMEOUT.

include_confidence.description: Include the service's confidence in its interpretation of the request.

oneOf.title: action Continuation Request
oneOf.description: Resume an action that returned `clarification_required` by supplying the requested inputs. Identified by the presence of `action_id`.

action_id.description: The action_id returned by a prior action response that needed clarification. Stable across clarification rounds.

user_id.description: Authenticated user ID. MUST match the user who started the action; RBAC is re-evaluated on this call.

inputs.description: Values for the fields the prior response listed in `clarification.needed[].name`, keyed by those field names.

user_preferences.description: Per-call preference overrides (e.g., timezone, output format).

timeout_seconds.description: Execution timeout (default 30). On exceed, return TIMEOUT.

include_confidence.description: Include the service's confidence in its interpretation of the request.
